meaning: adj.容易的,轻松而容易赚钱的
examples: And even though he does have a cushy draw, his lack of match play gives me pause.
He chose a challenging position at a state-owned manufacturer rather than a cushy job.
Compared to English or history graduate students, physics graduate students have a very cushy life.
Cushy cabins also have excellent views of lowland rainforest and are located near orangutan nests.
Cotroneo has no patience for stock Harleys, with their cushy hand-clutch transmissions and factory paint jobs.
